title: Registered Disability Savings Plans (RDSPs) - Canada.ca
content:
## Registered disability savings plan administration
For financial institutions on how to administer a registered disability savings plan (RDSP).

## Services and information

### Set
						up, amend or close a disability savings specimen plan
Requirements to create, change, and close a specimen plan

### Register
						a disability savings plan
Requirements for registering a disability savings plan under the Income Tax Act

### Put
						money into an RDSP
Contributions, grants, bonds, and rollovers

### Take
						money out of an RDSP
Types of payments permitted and payment rules

### Transfer
						an RDSP
Direct transfers to another RDSP and how to administer a transferred RDSP
When a plan must be or can be closed

### Forms
						and publications for RDSPs
RDSP bulletins, forms, guides, information circulars, and income tax folios
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
